title: useModoConfig
description: Access the global ModoProvider configuration and helper functions that resolve component props against the global theme. Works inside ModoProvider; falls back to sensible defaults when used outside.

api.config: Returns the full `ModoConfig` object injected by ModoProvider. Returns `undefined` outside a provider.
api.resolvedColor: Resolves a local `color` prop with fallback to global brand color. Semantic values ('primary', 'danger', etc.) always win; 'default' or undefined falls back.
api.resolvedRadius: Resolves radius: local prop → global config → default ('medium').
api.resolvedSize: Resolves size: local prop → global config → default ('medium').
api.resolvedTheme: Resolves theme: local prop → global config → default ('zinc').
api.resolvedHalo: Resolves halo: local prop → global config → default ('tinted').
api.modoLocale: Returns the deep-merged locale object. Works outside ModoProvider too.
api.localeString: Resolves a locale string getter + interpolates `{name}` placeholders.

resolve.title: Resolving props
resolve.desc: When a component prop is 'default' or undefined, use the global theme value.

locale.title: Locale helpers
locale.desc: Access the merged locale and interpolate strings with placeholders.
locale.body: useModoLocale and useLocaleString work even outside a ModoProvider.
